concepts.angle: PUSH — deadline panic + stuck-skill wall (A1 + A2): open on the pain so Thảo self-selects.
concepts.headline: Còn 6 tuần nộp hồ sơ, Speaking vẫn 5.5?
concepts.sub_copy: Còn kịp — nếu biết luyện đúng.
concepts.visual_desc: vertical 9:16, a smartphone showing an IELTS band card beside a wall calendar counting down, warm anxious lighting, a Vietnamese student's hand; all copy overlaid as caption, not baked

concepts.angle: PUSH — the 'học mãi' wall, no feedback loop (A2/A3): name the frustration of not knowing what is wrong.
concepts.headline: Học mãi mà không biết sai ở đâu?
concepts.sub_copy: AI chấm Writing & Speaking, chỉ ra đúng lỗi cần sửa.
concepts.visual_desc: square 1:1, split frame — left a frustrated learner with crossed-out notes, right a clean AI feedback panel highlighting an error and its fix; product UI in Prep brand colors; copy overlaid as caption

concepts.angle: PULL — roadmap to a named band (A4): pay off the panic with a clear daily plan.
concepts.headline: Lộ trình rõ ràng tới band bạn cần.
concepts.sub_copy: Mỗi ngày biết chính xác phải luyện gì.
concepts.visual_desc: vertical 9:16, a clean mobile Study Plan dashboard with today's tasks and a progress line rising toward a goal flag, optimistic bright palette; the goal band number is a caption overlay, not baked

concepts.angle: DEFUSE anxiety — peer-scale social proof (A5): the only PrepEdu number, full anchor text, to de-risk before a parent pays.
concepts.headline: Hơn 500.000 học viên đã tin chọn Prep
concepts.sub_copy: Đồng hành cùng bạn tới band mục tiêu.
concepts.visual_desc: square 1:1, celebratory brand lockup with a grid of diverse young Vietnamese learner avatars, confident bright mood; the 500.000+ trust line is a deterministic caption overlay, NEVER rendered by the image model

concepts.angle: PULL — the AI-scoring mechanism answers 'can an app fix Speaking/Writing?' (A4/A8) without any outcome claim.
concepts.headline: AI chỉ ra đúng chỗ Speaking & Writing cần sửa.
concepts.sub_copy: Luyện đúng lỗi, không học mò.
concepts.visual_desc: vertical 9:16, screen-recording style of an AI scoring a speaking waveform with a pronunciation flag and a writing error with a suggested fix, clean product UI, Prep brand colors; copy overlaid as caption

concepts.angle: DEFUSE habit — one-tap low-commitment trigger (A10): break free-app inertia with a free band-check to Zalo OA.
concepts.headline: Biết ngay bạn còn cách band mục tiêu bao xa.
concepts.sub_copy: Kiểm tra trình độ miễn phí, nhận lộ trình qua Zalo OA.
concepts.visual_desc: square 1:1, a friendly mobile free-level-check CTA button with a short band-check flow and a Zalo OA badge, clean approachable product shot; button and badge text overlaid as caption
